summary:
Adjusted the generated accessor signature for struct references to return shared borrows, so nested getters now match the expected `&T` form (`src/codegen.rs:70`). Also clarified the inline comment describing that behavior in the same block.

Tests: `./test.sh` (passes; script still emits existing grep option warnings).

You could 1) clean up the grep invocations in `test.sh` if you want quieter output.
